message.content:
I'll start by examining the workspace structure and reading the existing constraints to understand the current state of the workflow. Let me check what files exist and what constraints are in place.```bash

ls -la /tmp_workspace/ 2>/dev/null
ls -la /tmp_workspace/episodes/ 2>/dev/null
ls -la /tmp_workspace/evidence/ 2>/dev/null
ls -la /tmp_workspace/results/ 2>/dev/null || echo "results directory does not exist"
```
